calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Moss for Petitioners. Charles Wolff for Lawrence Wong.

Ms. Moss reported that her client was going to file an appeal and requested that the matter be continued for status. In addition, she stated that there was a will contest and that she did not want to loose grounds to act on the violation of the no contest clause. The Court took the Petition of Probate of Will and the Will Contest off calendar. The Court is not dismissing either Petition. The petition can be re-noticed if neccessary depending on the outcome of the appeal.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Continued To Dec-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Wolff for Lawrence Wong (Respondent).

Mr. Woolf reported that he received a call from the petitioner's attorney stating that she saw no need to come in and requested the matter be dismissed or taken off calendar. The Court stated that Ms. Moss was unable to appear due to an emergency and continued the matter to December 3, 2007. Ms. Moss may appear by Court Call if necessary.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287897. Jennifer Moss appearing for petitioner for both cases. Charles Wolff appearing for Lawrence Wong. Discovery is not completed. Issue on consolidation of both cases addressed. Matter is referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial in the Trust case only. Order signed.
In case number 287898, the Will issue can not be resolved until after the trial on the Trust case. Matter is continued to 6/4.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

No appearance if counsel stipulate to have the matter referred to the Presiding Judge for trial setting. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble CSR#3058. Clerk: Ella Yip. PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Case called with case no. 287897. Jennifer Moss appearing for petitioner in both cases. Charles Wolff appearing for respondent in both cases. Deposition is pending. Parties want mediation. The matter is too large for pro bono mediation. Court questions why the later will is not filed. Counsel will resolve that issue by the time of the next hearing. Matter is continued to 8/7. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
